components.description: Lightweight theme scope for Cindor tokens and descendant components.

Keyboard-accessible side navigation landmark with nested sections.

Use direct child `cindor-side-nav-item` elements, optionally nesting them to
create collapsible sections.

Navigable row used inside CindorSideNav.

Set `href` to render the row as a link, or omit it to render a button-like
item that can toggle its nested children.

elements in the default slot to create branches.
